headline: The best July 4th sales we found so far
summary: July 4th sales are ongoing despite Prime Day ending. Expect familiar deals from retailers like Best Buy. Find significant discounts on various tech products.

headline: Weber marks down grills and griddles to their best prices ever for July 4th
summary: Weber is offering major discounts on grills, smokers, and griddles. These are some of the best prices ever seen for their products. Perfect for July 4th holiday cooking and outdoor entertaining.

headline: The video game disc is dead
summary: The era of physical video game discs is coming to an end. For decades, gamers accumulated physical copies, but this trend is reversing. This podcast episode explores the demise of the video game disc.

headline: Influencer screenings aren't going away
summary: Reports of Universal canceling influencer screenings for "The Odyssey" were inaccurate. Influencers attended special press junket showings alongside traditional critics. Advanced screenings for influencers remain a part of movie promotions.

headline: Get a 48V 500W Adult Electric Scooter with 22-Mile Range and a Top Speed of 22mph for $155
summary: A powerful 48V 500W adult electric scooter is available for only $155. It boasts a 22-mile range and a top speed of 22mph. This is touted as the most powerful e-scooter under $200.

headline: 6 Standout TV Deals From Best Buy's 4th of July Sale
summary: Best Buy's 4th of July sale features six significant TV deals. Upgrade your home entertainment setup with major screen discounts. Celebrate America's birthday with a new television for less.

headline: GTA 6 Would Probably Run on the Steam Machine
summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 is expected to run on the Steam Machine upon its PC release. It will likely require lower settings for optimal performance. While not launching on PC immediately, its compatibility is discussed.

headline: Hellraiser: Revival Is a Horror-Action Game That Borrows from Resident Evil and P.T. | IGN Preview
summary: "Hellraiser: Revival" is an upcoming horror-action game inspired by Resident Evil and P.T. It fuses elements from these iconic titles into a cohesive survival horror experience. The game appears to align well with the Hellraiser series' themes.

headline: Married at First Sight UK star arrested on suspicion of rape
summary: A star from "Married at First Sight UK" has been arrested on suspicion of rape. This arrest follows a BBC Panorama investigation into the Channel 4 reality show. The news comes after a May broadcast of the exposé.

headline: Boys who raped teen girls given custodial sentences
summary: Two teenage boys convicted of raping teen girls have received custodial sentences. This decision reverses initial non-custodial sentences. The case sparked public concern and debate over justice.

headline: Pubs allowed to stay open until 5am for England Mexico match
summary: Pubs across England will extend opening hours until 5 am for the upcoming Mexico match. This reverses the government's earlier stance against further World Cup licensing relaxations. Football fans can now enjoy extended celebrations.

headline: Labour failed to prepare for power, admits PM's former top aide
summary: Morgan McSweeney, former top aide to the Prime Minister, admitted Labour was unprepared for power. In his first interview, he stated the party didn't deliver quickly enough in office. This revelation sheds light on past government inefficiencies.
